projects.name: AI Telegram Chatbot
projects.description: 24/7 automated Telegram bot for a client, powered by Claude Haiku. Handles FAQs, captures leads, and escalates to human when needed.

projects.name: KSTphoto — Photography Portfolio & CMS
projects.description: Luxury photography landing page for Kristina, a fashion & lifestyle photographer based in Marbella, Spain. Built with Next.js 14, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. Features a cinematic dark aesthetic, 4-language switcher (RU/UA/ES/EN), Cloudinary image storage, password-protected admin panel with live content editing, and deployed on Vercel.
tags: Next.js / React / TypeScript / Tailwind CSS / Framer Motion / Cloudinary / Vercel / i18n / CMS / Admin Panel  / Photography / Landing Page / Dark UI / Luxury Design/  Full Stack

reviews.quote: Delivered exactly what I needed — fast, clean, and professional. The landing page went live in 3 days and already converted new clients.
Our renovation business looks completely premium now. The site design built instant trust with new customers. Highly recommend.
The Telegram bot handles 80% of our support tickets automatically. We're saving hours every day. Best investment this quarter.

services.title: AI Landing Pages
